/usr/bin/ar qc liblethe-solvers.a CMakeFiles/lethe-solvers.dir/analytical_solutions.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-solvers.dir/auxiliary_physics.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-solvers.dir/cahn_hilliard.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-solvers.dir/flow_control.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-solvers.dir/fluid_dynamics_block.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-solvers.dir/fluid_dynamics_matrix_based.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-solvers.dir/fluid_dynamics_nitsche.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-solvers.dir/heat_transfer.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-solvers.dir/heat_transfer_assemblers.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-solvers.dir/heat_transfer_scratch_data.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-solvers.dir/initial_conditions.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-solvers.dir/isothermal_compressible_navier_stokes_assembler.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-solvers.dir/isothermal_compressible_navier_stokes_vof_assembler.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-solvers.dir/fluid_dynamics_matrix_free.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-solvers.dir/fluid_dynamics_matrix_free_operators.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-solvers.dir/multiphysics_interface.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-solvers.dir/navier_stokes_assemblers.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-solvers.dir/navier_stokes_base.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-solvers.dir/navier_stokes_cahn_hilliard_assemblers.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-solvers.dir/navier_stokes_scratch_data.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-solvers.dir/navier_stokes_vof_assemblers.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-solvers.dir/physical_properties_manager.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-solvers.dir/postprocessing_cfd.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-solvers.dir/postprocessing_velocities.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-solvers.dir/postprocessing_scalar.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-solvers.dir/postprocessors_smoothing.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-solvers.dir/simulation_parameters.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-solvers.dir/solid_phase.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-solvers.dir/source_terms.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-solvers.dir/tracer.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-solvers.dir/tracer_assemblers.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-solvers.dir/tracer_drift_velocity.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-solvers.dir/tracer_scratch_data.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-solvers.dir/vof.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-solvers.dir/vof_algebraic_interface_reinitialization.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-solvers.dir/vof_assemblers.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-solvers.dir/vof_curvature_projection.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-solvers.dir/vof_filter.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-solvers.dir/vof_linear_subequations_solver.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-solvers.dir/vof_phase_gradient_projection.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-solvers.dir/vof_scratch_data.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-solvers.dir/vof_subequations_interface.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-solvers.dir/euler_euler_sf.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-solvers.dir/euler_void_fraction.cc.o
/usr/bin/ranlib liblethe-solvers.a
